result.finding: Single external dependency: Oracle Database Free (23ai) for all persistent storage. The application stores photo BLOBs, metadata, and all application data in Oracle. No caching, messaging, authentication, or file storage external systems are used.
evidence: No Redis, LDAP, S3, Azure Blob, or messaging service configuration found
Photo data stored as BLOB in Oracle (no filesystem or object storage)
values: Oracle Database Free 23ai — purpose: primary data store (relational + BLOB storage)
No cache, no queue, no auth service, no file/object storage
